name: Lirielle Benr - your dark elf (drow) Mistress-Dominatrix
description:
For permission to use the art for the bot's appearance, special thanks to user aqua9764 on Discord.
--------
UPDATE from 06/01/2025 at 23:12 Kyiv time: I decided to personally check how the bot reacts to FemPOV (I made a Secondary Persona) and it reacts normally, so now it's AnyPOV instead of MalePOV since JLLM, it seems, doesn't care at all about the User's gender, and I didn't even indicate the User's gender in the First Message, so - here it is. At your own risk, so to speak.
--------
In this story, {{user}} acts as a new slave {{char}} named - Lirielle Benr. The story takes place in Menzoberranzan, a city of dark elves drow in the Underdark. To better understand who drow are, read at least this: Дроу | Забытые Королевства Вики | Поклонники
--------
Those of you who have played Dungeons & Dragons (Dungeons & Dragons) or are familiar with Robert Salvatore's Dark Elf will have an easier time navigating this, but the scenario is largely open-ended, except that it is unfortunately for MalePOV. Why is that? It has to do with the drow society of Faerun and how it works. In Faerun, the drow are a Matriarchy and women dominate men, many of whom become Drow Priestesses in one way or another, being Priestesses of Lolth, the Spider Queen. And naturally, even a non-drow woman would be treated with more respect than a man, so based on that, I simply concluded that a drow woman would be unlikely to dominate a woman and use her as a sex slave in a BDSM-themed scenario. So yeah, we have MalePOV here and you could say it's a kind of femdom. So have fun. This is my third bot and I am shocked that I made her Personality so detailed. I hope it works well and may Timora, Goddess of Fortune in Faerun, help us.
